findings.message: `$STR.replace` method will only replace the first occurrence when used with a string argument ($CHAR). If this method is used for escaping of dangerous data then there is a possibility for a bypass. Try to use sanitization library instead or use a Regex with a global flag.

cwe: CWE-116: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output
